model_output: All 5 confirmed entries found. Now let me compute the hash:

args.command:
python3 -c "
import hashlib
s = 'Carrick=76.3 dB|Halewick=111.2 dB|Saltmoor=88.0 dB|Vyport=92.4 dB|Wenmoor=104.7 dB'
print(repr(s))
print(hashlib.sha1(s.encode('utf-8')).hexdigest())
"
args.description: Compute SHA-1 of joined entity=value pairs
